name: Decentral Life, Inc.
business: The company operates as a Technology Business Incubator (TBI), licensing its AI-powered social networking and ecommerce platform to tech startups in niche industries. It also develops and licenses decentralized applications (dApps) built on the Ethereum blockchain to clients.
sellsTo: Tech startup companies in hunting, fishing, camping, RV travel, motor racing, racket sports, boating, e-biking, cycling, golfing, cannabis, hemp, space exploration, soccer, transportation, blockchain, AI, and residential real estate sectors
Clients that license dApps and may not participate in the TBI program

exposures.sentence: Our own IP technology is an artificial intelligence (AI) powered social network and ecommerce platform that leverages blockchain technology to increase development speed, user privacy and security, and incorporates the use of cryptocurrency in the form of NFT s and token securities used throughout the niche social platforms that we license to the companies in our TBI program.
We also develop and license decentralized applications (dApps) built on the Ethereum blockchain, that are sold to our clients that do not necessarily participate in our TBI program.
